resources.string: Hey! Here is a link to download PodHopper. I\'m really enjoying it and thought you might too. \nhttps://podhopper.app
If on, PodHopper will go back a little in episodes you resume so you can catch up more comfortably.
PodHopper is now refreshing all your podcast images, this will happen in the background and may take a little time.
Some shows have custom artwork for certain episodes. Enable this option and PodHopper will display them instead of the show’s artwork.
Attempt to restore any downloaded files if they are missing in the PodHopper app.
Prioritizing seek accuracy can significantly slow down seek responsiveness and cause PodHopper to consume more data.
To get notifications from PodHopper, you\'ll need to turn them on in your device settings.

The most common cause is that you have an ad-blocker configured on your phone or network. You’ll need to unblock this domain to download podcasts. Please note PodHopper doesn’t host or choose where podcasts are hosted, that’s up to the author of the show and is out of our control.
Podcast authors host episode files in various hosting providers not managed by PodHopper.
